title: Death Locator
description: Track the location of death using waypoints
body: ## Description This mod/datapack adds death markers to the waypoint. ![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/007c57dd4c07f1e5d0d9ae4ff9ba4b77903ebaa7.png) ## How to use After the player dies, a marker appears that will lead the player to his death point, there can be several such points. The markers are removed only when the player gets close enough to it so that they do not accumulate indefinitely. ## Settings To make markers visible only when the player has a recovery compass in their inventory, you need to write this command ``` /trigger bizcub.use_recovery_compass ``` To return it back, you need to write this command ``` /trigger bizcub.dont_use_recovery_compass ``` ## Icon By default, the icon does not have the shape of a skull. But in the photo showing the functions of the mod, the icon is changed. For this, I used a resource pack, which you can download below in the mod or datapack files ## Dependencies - Fabric loader requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
